# Harrison Vance - Cloud & DevOps Engineer Portfolio

## Overview
Harrison Vance is a Cloud and DevOps Engineer with over 10 years of experience in architecting secure, observable, and autonomous cloud ecosystems. This portfolio showcases institutional-grade infrastructure and AI-driven automation.

## Key Projects

### 1. Terraform Landing Zone
- **URL:** https://github.com/harrison-vc/terraform-landing-zone
- **Purpose:** Enterprise-grade AWS Landing Zone baseline.
- **Tech Stack:** Terraform, AWS, HCL, GitHub Actions, OIDC, tfsec.
- **Features:** Modular design, Multi-AZ VPC, zero-trust OIDC auth, automated security scanning.

### 2. Algorithmic Trading App
- **URL:** https://github.com/harrison-vc/algorithmic-trading-app
- **Purpose:** High-frequency execution engine.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, C++, Redis, AWS.
- **Metrics:** Sub-10ms latency, real-time risk parity.

### 3. AWS Bedrock Agent
- **URL:** https://github.com/harrison-vc/aws-bedrock-agent
- **Purpose:** Autonomous AI orchestration for infrastructure troubleshooting.
- **Tech Stack:** AWS Bedrock, Lambda, Python, Boto3.

### 4. Incident Postmortems
- **URL:** https://github.com/harrison-vc/incident-postmortems
- **Purpose:** SRE documentation and RCA strategies.

## Contact
- **Website:** https://harrisonvance.cc
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/harrison-vance
